hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ap=os.path.abspath(p) if p else ''; blocked_exact=['.env','.env.local','.env.production','.env.development']; blocked_dirs=['.git/','node_modules/','.vercel/']; blocked_names=['CLAUDE.md','AGENTS.md','PROMPT.md','SPECIFICATION.md']; blocked_prefixes=['.claude/skills/']; hit=any(os.path.basename(ap)==b for b in blocked_exact) or any(('/'+b) in (ap+'/') for b in blocked_dirs) or any(os.path.basename(ap)==b for b in blocked_names) or any(b in ap for b in blocked_prefixes); sys.exit(2 if hit else 0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); protected=['.github/workflows/','pnpm-lock.yaml']; hit=any(x in p for x in protected); sys.exit(2 if hit else 0)"

echo '--- FORGE CONTEXT RECOVERY ---'; echo 'You are the Forge orchestrator in a build loop.'; if [ -f .forge-temp/status.json ]; then echo 'Current progress:'; cat .forge-temp/status.json; fi; if [ -f .forge-temp/current-issue ]; then echo "Currently working on issue #$(cat .forge-temp/current-issue)"; fi; echo 'After compaction, re-run /forge to sync state and continue.'; echo '--- END RECOVERY ---'

python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); os.makedirs('.forge-temp',exist_ok=True); f=open('.forge-temp/session.log','a'); f.write(p+'\n') if p else None; f.close()"

python3 -c "import json,sys,time; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); gh_muts=['gh issue create','gh issue comment','gh issue edit','gh issue close','gh issue develop','gh pr create','gh pr comment','gh pr edit','gh label create']; api_flags=[' -f ',' -X POST',' -X PATCH',' -X PUT',' -X DELETE']; is_mut=any(m in cmd for m in gh_muts) or ('gh api' in cmd and any(f in cmd for f in api_flags)); time.sleep(1) if is_mut else None"

python3 -c "import json,subprocess,os
session_log='.forge-temp/session.log'; issue_file='.forge-temp/current-issue'; status_file='.forge-temp/status.json'; exit_file='.forge-temp/exit-status'
if os.path.exists(session_log) and os.path.exists(issue_file):
    issue=open(issue_file).read().strip(); files=open(session_log).read().strip()
    if files:
        body='Session ended. Files modified:\\n\\n'+'\\n'.join('- '+f for f in sorted(set(files.splitlines())))
        subprocess.run(['gh','issue','comment',issue,'--body',body],capture_output=True)
status='needs-restart'
if os.path.exists(status_file):
    try:
        data=json.load(open(status_file)); iss=data.get('issues',{})
        if iss.get('total',0)>0 and iss.get('closed',0)==iss.get('total',0): status='complete'
        elif iss.get('revision_needed',0)>0: status='needs-restart'
        elif iss.get('done_awaiting_merge',0)>0 and iss.get('in_progress',0)==0: status='needs-human'
        elif iss.get('in_progress',0)==0 and iss.get('needs_human',0)>0: status='needs-human'
    except: status='error'
os.makedirs('.forge-temp',exist_ok=True)
open(exit_file,'w').write(status)
for f in [session_log,issue_file]:
    if os.path.exists(f): os.remove(f)"
